title: Migration Verify Manifest
description: JSON Schema for a migration directory's verify.json file (per ADR-027 § Hybrid migrations). Binary assertions confirming a migration produced valid output. /sf:update's VERIFYING state runs each assertion against every migrated page; FAIL triggers ROLLBACK_PAGE.

migration.description: Migration identifier; matches the basename of the directory holding this file (e.g. 'identity-1-to-2').

page_type.description: The page-type this migration applies to. Must be a key in schemas.json#page_types.

assertions.description: Each assertion is evaluated against the migrated page. All non-optional assertions must PASS for the page to be accepted.

description.description: Human-readable explanation. Surfaced in /sf:update output on failure.

predicate.description: The check kind. v1 vocabulary; extended in MAJOR framework bumps.

optional.description: If true, a FAIL is reported but does not trigger ROLLBACK_PAGE. Useful for conditional-shape assertions (e.g. a field that only existed if the source had it).

target.description: Which part of the page the predicate evaluates against. Defaults to frontmatter.

field.description: Frontmatter key referenced by yaml.* predicates.

snapshot_field.description: Pre-migration field name read from the snapshot for snapshot.value-preserved.

post_field.description: Post-migration field name read from the migrated file for snapshot.value-preserved.

path.description: File path for file.exists. ${page_dir} and ${wiki_root} placeholders supported.
